Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Jul-12-2010 Continued To Aug-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory O'Keeffe for Walter Kroll.

Mr. O'Keeffe stated that he sent a draft of the petition to his Client but that he received no response. The matter was continued to August 9, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Y. Watts.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Appraisal INVENTORY
Off Calendar Mar-03-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-03-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel, or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Conservator, Walter Kroll III, and his Attorney for failure to file the Inventory and Appraisal. The return date is March 3, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: Raymond Arata Jr. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jackie Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-12-2009 Continued To Jan-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The Court continued the matter to January 20, 2009 for counsel to appear. The Court will give notice to counsel.

(The Clerk notified Mr. O'Keefe by phone of the next hearing date.)

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
